title: Seoul Story
synopsis: 서울을 처음 방문한 외국인 친구 Liam. 당신이 영어로 서울을 안내하며 친해지는 이야기.

scenes.line: Wow, I finally made it to Seoul! Are you Eunil?
scenes.target: Yes! Welcome to Seoul, Liam. How was your flight?

scenes.line: Long, but I'm so excited. Where should we go first?
scenes.target: Let's drop your bags and grab some food.

scenes.line: Sounds perfect. I've heard Korean food is amazing.
scenes.target: You're going to love it. Trust me.

scenes.line: This river park is huge! What do people do here?
scenes.target: They have picnics, ride bikes, and relax.

scenes.line: Can we get that chicken-and-beer thing I read about?
scenes.target: Chimaek! Great choice, let's order some.

scenes.line: This is the best night ever. Thank you for this.
scenes.target: Anytime. I'm happy you're here.

scenes.line: So many stalls! How do I order without Korean?
scenes.target: Just point and say 'this one, please.' I'll help.

scenes.line: That tteokbokki looks spicy. Should I try it?
scenes.target: Go for it, but start with a small bite.

scenes.line: Spicy but amazing! You're the best guide ever.
scenes.target: Haha, I'm glad you're enjoying Seoul.

scenes.line: These hanbok are gorgeous! Should I really wear one?
scenes.target: Of course! It's the best way to enjoy the palace.

scenes.line: How do I look? Be honest.
scenes.target: You look great. It really suits you.

scenes.line: Let's take a photo in front of the gate!
scenes.target: Good idea. Say kimchi!

scenes.line: A noraebang? I can't sing at all!
scenes.target: Don't worry, no one's judging. Just have fun.

scenes.line: Okay, pick a song for me — something easy.
scenes.target: How about a classic everyone knows?

scenes.line: That was so much fun! Best night in Seoul.
scenes.target: I'm so glad you enjoyed it.

scenes.line: I can't believe my trip is almost over.
scenes.target: Time flew by, didn't it?

scenes.line: Thank you for showing me the real Seoul.
scenes.target: It was my pleasure, honestly.

scenes.line: Promise you'll visit me someday?
scenes.target: I promise. Let's stay in touch.

scenes.line: Hey! Can you see me okay? How's Seoul?
scenes.target: Crystal clear! Seoul misses you.

scenes.line: I've been telling everyone about the food here.
scenes.target: You should bring them next time!

scenes.line: Actually, I'm planning another trip. Free next month?
scenes.target: For you? Always. Let's plan it.

scenes.line: I'm back! And this time I learned some Korean.
scenes.target: No way! Let's hear it.

scenes.line: Annyeong! Did I say it right?
scenes.target: Perfect! Your accent is great.

scenes.line: We make a good team, you and I.
scenes.target: The best. Here's to more adventures.

scenes.line: What if we traveled somewhere new together?
scenes.target: I'd love that. Where to?

scenes.line: Anywhere, as long as we go together.
scenes.target: Then let's make a bucket list.

scenes.line: Deal. This is just the start, right?
scenes.target: Definitely. The best is yet to come.
